rules.explanation_for_clinician: Valproate is contraindicated in pregnancy due to high teratogenic and neurodevelopmental risk; avoid except where all other options have failed and only under specialist supervision.
Manage pregnancy jointly with perinatal psychiatry; weigh untreated maternal illness against medication risk, prefer agents with more reproductive-safety data, and use the lowest effective dose.
During lactation, prefer agents with established infant-safety data, use the lowest effective dose, and monitor the infant for adverse effects.
